steps.title: Spot the clarifying clause
steps.content: The clause after the blank defines what “the rate of cognate replacement” actually means — this is a clarification, not an example, parallel case, or additional point.

steps.title: Choose the clarifying transition
steps.content: That is, is the standard transition for restatement and clarification. The other three transitions introduce examples, suggest parallels, or add new information — functions that don't fit here. That matches choice D — D is correct.
